'''''Dodonna''''' was a [[Galactic-class battle carrier|''Galactic''-class battle carrier]] in the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]].

==History==
The ship was named after [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]], one of the heroes of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It was just as long as an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial star destroyer]], though broader and massing fifty percent more than the Imperial design. The classification of "battle carrier" was alluded to be a political, rather than practical, change as the design was reminiscent of earlier Star Destroyers, albeit much more modern.

It was commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Matric Klauskin]] and acted as [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]] in the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Other officers included [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Moyan]], Colonel [[Fiav Fenn]], and Admiral [[Tarla Limpan]].<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal" />

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], she was forced to retreat from [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] when she was [[Battle of Corellia (Second Galactic Civil War)|attacked]] by [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] and [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] naval forces. After inflicting heavy damage to [[Centerpoint Station]], ''Dodonna'' jumped to the rendezvous point with the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] and the ''[[Blue Diver]]''. After [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Tarla Limpan]] transferred her flag to the ''Blue Diver'', the ''Dodonna'' was recalled to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

{{Ship-stub}}
